AboutContact

Crochet Workshop Resources

Thank you so much for coming to my crochet workshop at Brooklyn Craft Company! I hope you enjoyed the class and are feeling confident as you work to finish your crochet project. This page includes all the links and tutorials we discussed in class, as well as next steps to continue your crochet journey.

If you’d like more guidance or 1:1 help, you’re always welcome to contact me for private lessons or support.

Finishing Your Project ◇ What’s Next? ◇ Crochet Tutorials and Patterns


Finishing Your Project

Find the workshop you took in the list below to access the pattern, tutorials, and finishing instructions:

  • Crochet 101: Chunky Cowl
  • Crochet 101: Lil’ Scarf
  • Crochet 101: Lil’ Bag
  • Crochet 102: Bandana


What’s Next?

  • Practice your skills by finishing your project using the steps and resources below
  • Join a local crafting circle or crochet group to connect with others (there’s one every week at the Greenpoint library!)
  • Keep learning by signing up for additional crochet workshops at Brooklyn Craft Company, such as:
    • Crochet 101: Chunky Cowl: Learn the double crochet stitch and how to work in the round.
    • Crochet 101: Lil’ Scarf: Learn the single crochet stitch, crochet decreases, and how to work in rows.
    • Crochet 102: Bandana: Learn how to shape crochet fabric by using increase and decreases.
    • Tunisian Crochet 101: Learn Tunisian crochet basics and make an ear warmer.
    • Crochet Hexagon Motifs: Learn the double crochet stitch, how to make hexagon motifs, and the zipper method for seaming.
    • Upcycled Crochet Rag Rug: Learn how to make your own yarn out of fabric scraps and use it to crochet a circular rug.
    • Crochet a Summer Top: Learn new stitch patterns and techniques for making crochet clothes.
  • Bookmark this page so you can revisit links as you need them
  • Join Ravelry and start finding patterns you are excited to make!
